summary: Iteration 265: DDT Numbering, Fatture Collegate, SDI Preview Testing Complete. 28/29 backend tests passed (96.5%). All frontend code review tests passed. Verified: 1) DDT atomic counter uses db.counters collection with find_one_and_update and $inc, 2) DDT number field is editable (DDTCreate and DDTUpdate models have optional 'number' field), 3) Fatture collegate endpoints exist (GET/POST/DELETE) and require authentication, 4) DDT counter initialization at startup uses $max aggregation, 5) DDT list returns all types including conto_lavoro, 6) Frontend DDTEditorPage has data-testid='input-ddt-number', 7) CommessaHubPage has data-testid='fatture-collegate' and 'link-fattura-dialog', 8) SdiPreviewDialog receives enriched invoice object with numero, client_name, totale, iva, client_piva fields.

minor.issue: Transient network timeout during test (endpoint works correctly when tested manually)

critical_code_review_comments: DDT atomic counter correctly uses db.counters.find_one_and_update with $inc for atomic increment
DDT number format: vendita=DDT-YYYY-XXXX, conto_lavoro=CL-YYYY-XXXX, rientro=RCL-YYYY-XXXX
Counter _id format: ddt_{type}_{user_id}_{year} - per-user, per-year counters
Fatture collegate endpoints correctly update both commessa (fatture_collegate array) and invoices (commessa_id field)
link_fatture uses $addToSet to prevent duplicates, unlink_fattura uses $pull and $unset
SdiPreviewDialog validates: client_name, numero, totale, iva, stato, client_piva/cf, client_sdi_code/pec
DDT list endpoint correctly returns all types when ddt_type param is not specified

success_rate.backend: 96.5% (28/29 pytest tests passed - 1 transient network timeout)
success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - all data-testid attributes present

seed_data_creation: Used existing data: commessa com_e8c4810ad476, DDTs ddt_b7e1f1ea8733 (CL-2026-0002), invoices inv_03ff13a2df32, inv_bb29c5c5e42a
context_for_next_testing_agent: DDT numbering with atomic counters fully implemented. Counters stored in db.counters with format ddt_{type}_{user_id}_{year}. Fatture collegate endpoints at /api/commesse/{id}/fatture-collegate (GET/POST/DELETE). SdiPreviewDialog receives enriched invoice object from InvoiceEditorPage. All features require Google OAuth authentication.

TestDDTAtomicCounter.test_counters_collection_exists: PASS - counters collection exists with DDT counters

TestDDTNumberEditable.test_create_ddt_uses_custom_number: PASS - checks data.number, falls back to next_ddt_number

TestDDTCounterInitialization.test_counters_match_existing_ddts: PASS - counters >= max existing for test user

TestDDTListAllTypes.test_ddt_list_no_type_filter_by_default: PASS - only filters when ddt_type provided

verified_features.ddt_atomic_counter: VERIFIED - uses db.counters with atomic find_one_and_update
verified_features.ddt_number_editable: VERIFIED - DDTCreate and DDTUpdate have optional number field
verified_features.fatture_collegate_endpoints: VERIFIED - GET/POST/DELETE endpoints exist and require auth
verified_features.ddt_counter_initialization: VERIFIED - lifespan initializes counters from existing data
verified_features.ddt_list_all_types: VERIFIED - returns all DDT types when no filter specified
verified_features.sdi_preview_enriched: VERIFIED - SdiPreviewDialog receives enriched invoice object
